scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); for (const file of ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock']) { try { fs.rmSync(file); } catch {} } if (!String(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '').startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
